steps.title: Identify the goal
steps.content: The goal is to indicate the location of the Isthmus of Panama. This is the decisive signal — which choice actually states where it is?

steps.title: Match the answer to the goal
steps.content:
B directly states “located in Central America,” which accomplishes the goal of indicating location.

  • A merely mentions it as an example
  • C defines an isthmus in general terms
  • D describes what an isthmus does without specifying where this one is
.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
